title: Images to PDF
intro: Turn your JPG and PNG images into a PDF — reorder them, rotate them, and pick the page size. Your images never leave your device.
dropSubtitle: or click to browse your device
dropFootnote: JPG and PNG. Everything stays on your device.
dragToReorder: Drag the cards to change the order
sortAz: Sort by name, A to Z
sortAzAria: Sort images by name, A to Z
sortZa: Sort by name, Z to A
sortZaAria: Sort images by name, Z to A
orientationFitTitle: The page follows each image when "Fit to image" is on
multiInfo: Showing the first of <0>{{count}} PDFs</0> — one per image. They download together as a single .zip.
onlyJpgPng: Only JPG and PNG images can be added.
